notes: Optional L8 dhat heap-profiling smoke over one warmed process_session() pass.
Enabled only with --features alloc-profile; production builds stay on the System allocator.
Local debug baseline observed ~20-80 KiB max_bytes / ~200-400 total_blocks; ceilings keep large headroom.
Companion to counting-allocator smoke in allocation-budget.json — not jemalloc and not continuous daemon profiling.
Not a production SLA; tighten after sustained allocator evidence accumulates.
